change: Add real hipEngine memory reporting to qwen35_paro_bench.py using tracked hipengine.core.memory high-water counters plus hipMemGetInfo phase snapshots.

validation.py_compile: python3 -m py_compile hipengine/core/hip.py hipengine/core/memory.py scripts/qwen35_paro_bench.py # ok
validation.smoke: python3 scripts/qwen35_paro_bench.py --token-id 9707 --prompt-length 8 --decode-tokens 1 --warmup-decode-tokens 0 --max-layers 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/task15-memory-smoke.json # emitted memory + memory_snapshots; tracked after_close=0

notes: tracked_* covers hipEngine allocations made through hipengine.core.memory.malloc and keeps a high-water mark across freed prefill workspaces.
hip_used_peak_sampled_* is sampled via hipMemGetInfo at phase boundaries, not a continuous device-wide peak.
owned_session_* sums buffers owned by the resident session at each sampled point and excludes external HIP/AOTriton internal allocations.
tracked_* covers hipEngine allocations made through hipengine.core.memory.malloc and keeps a high-water mark across freed prefill workspaces.
hip_used_peak_sampled_* is sampled via hipMemGetInfo at phase boundaries, not a continuous device-wide peak.
owned_session_* sums buffers owned by the resident session at each sampled point and excludes external HIP/AOTriton internal allocations.
tracked_peak_allocated_gib is the hipEngine-owned allocation high-water mark through hipengine.core.memory.malloc; it is the closest analogue to parent torch peak_allocated_gib.
hip_used_peak_sampled_gib is sampled at phase boundaries via hipMemGetInfo and is not a continuous device-wide peak.
AOTriton remains opt-in with --attn-aotriton-min-tokens 512; default dispatch remains native until threshold sweep lands.
